info.name: Car Marketplace API
info.description:
Car Marketplace is a RESTful API for managing a car marketplace

It handles everything from user registration and authentication to car listings, profile management, and purchase requests — all secured with JWT tokens delivered via HTTP-only cookies.  
  
Auth — Register, login, and logout with cookie-based JWT sessions  
Profile — View and update user info, change password, and upload a profile photo  
Cars — Browse, search, add, update, and delete car listings with image uploads  
Requests — Submit and manage purchase requests between buyers and admins  
Feedback — Leave and retrieve reviews for car listings  
  
All protected routes require an authenticated session via the token cookie.

request.description:
## POST /api/auth/register

Registers a new user account.

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firstname | string | Yes | User's first name |
| lastname | string | Yes | User's last name |
| username | string | Yes | Unique username |
| email | string | Yes | Valid email address |
| password | string | Yes | Password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, number, and special character) |

---

### Responses

**201 Created — Success**

``` json
{
  "_id": "64f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8b9c0d1",
  "firstname": "Ahmed",
  "lastname": "Khalil",
  "username": "ahmedkhalil",
  "email": "itskhalil@gmail.com"
}

 ```

**400 Bad Request — Validation Error**

``` json
{
  "message": "Email already in use"
}

 ```

## POST /api/auth/login

Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token stored in an HTTP-only cookie.

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| email | string | Yes | Registered email address |
| password | string | Yes | Account password |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
{
  "message": "Login successful"
}

 ```

> JWT token is set as an HTTP-only cookie named `token`. 
  

**400 Bad Request — Wrong Credentials**

``` json
{
  "message": "Invalid email or password"
}

 ```

header.value: token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjZhMDcxOWE0ZTg1NDkzZDgyYjczMWQ0YyIsInJvbGUiOiJhZG1pbiIsImlhdCI6MTc3ODg1MDM0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzc4ODUzOTQ4fQ.WFZe0G9--Mm5-eW5qEXkxx8he_sOLZNlBi0FI5nBnX8; Max-Age=3600; Path=/; Expires=Fri, 15 May 2026 14:05:48 GMT; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict

request.description:
## GET /api/user

Returns the authenticated user's profile data.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

```json
{
  "_id": "64abc123def456",
  "name": "Ahmed Khalil",
  "email": "ahmed@example.com",
  "profileImage": "profile.jpg"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**

```json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

## PATCH /api/user

Updates the authenticated user's profile details.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| firstname | string | Yes | New first name |
| lastname | string | Yes | New last name |
| phone | string | No | Phone number (e.g. +201023456789) |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
{
  "message": "Profile updated successfully"
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}

 ```

## PATCH /api/user/email

Updates the authenticated user's email address.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| email | string | Yes | New email address |
| password | string | Yes | Current password to confirm the change |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
{
  "message": "Email updated successfully"
}

 ```

**400 Bad Request**

``` json
{
  "message": "Email already in use"
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}

 ```

## PATCH /api/user/password

Updates the authenticated user's password.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| old_password | string | Yes | Current password |
| new_password | string | Yes | New password (min 8 chars, must include uppercase, number, and special character) |
| confirm_password | string | Yes | Must match `new_password` |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
{
  "message": "Password updated successfully"
}

 ```

**400 Bad Request — Mismatch**

``` json
{
  "message": "Passwords do not match"
}

 ```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}

 ```

## POST /api/user/profile-image

Updates the authenticated user's profile picture.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| image | file | Yes | The image file to upload |

## DELETE /api/user

Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

```json
{
  "message": "Account deleted successfully"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**

```json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

## GET /api/cars

Returns a list of all available car listings.

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

```json
[
  {
    "_id": "64abc123def456",
    "brand": "Mercedes",
    "model": "C300",
    "year": 2023,
    "price": 4000000,
    "location": "Cairo",
    "status": "available",
    "images": ["image1.jpg"]
  }
]
```

request.description:
## GET /api/cars/:id

Retrieves a single car listing by its ID.

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Yes | MongoDB ID of the car |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

```json
{
  "_id": "64abc123def456",
  "brand": "Mercedes",
  "model": "C300",
  "year": 2023,
  "price": 4000000,
  "location": "Cairo",
  "status": "available",
  "images": ["image1.jpg"]
}
```

**404 Not Found**

```json
{
  "message": "Car not found"
}
```

## POST /api/cars

Creates a new car listing. Requires admin privileges.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brand | string | Yes | Car brand (e.g. Mercedes) |
| model | string | Yes | Car model (e.g. C300) |
| year | number | Yes | Manufacturing year (e.g. 2023) |
| price | number | Yes | Price in local currency (e.g. 4000000) |
| location | string | No | City or location of the car (e.g. Cairo) |
| status | string | Yes | Availability status: `available` or `sold` |
| images | file | Yes | One or more image files |

## PUT /api/cars/:id

Updates an existing car listing by its ID. Requires admin privileges.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).
Admin role required.

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Yes | MongoDB ID of the car to update |

---

### Request Body (multipart/form-data)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| brand | string | No | Car brand (e.g. Mercedes) |
| model | string | No | Car model (e.g. C300) |
| year | number | No | Manufacturing year (e.g. 2023) |
| price | number | No | Price in local currency (e.g. 4000000) |
| location | string | No | Location of the car |
| status | string | No | Listing status: `available` or `sold` |
| images | file | No | One or more image files |

## DELETE /api/cars/:id

Deletes a car listing by its ID. Requires admin privileges.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).
Admin role required.

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Yes | MongoDB ID of the car to delete |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

```json
{
  "message": "Car deleted successfully"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**

```json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

**403 Forbidden**

```json
{
  "message": "Forbidden"
}
```

**404 Not Found**

```json
{
  "message": "Car not found"
}
```

## GET /api/requests/my

Retrieves all rental requests submitted by the authenticated user.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
[
  {
    "_id": "6a07c9b84940abd04b4fb8ab",
    "carId": "69fe3ed3a47f07fe7e3e0ad7",
    "price": 25000,
    "status": "pending",
    "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
]
```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

## POST /api/requests

Creates a new rental request for a specific car.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`).

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| carId | string | Yes | The MongoDB ID of the car to request |
| price | number | Yes | The offered price for the rental |

---

### Responses

**201 Created — Success**

``` json
{
  "_id": "6a07c9b84940abd04b4fb8ab",
  "carId": "69fe3ed3a47f07fe7e3e0ad7",
  "price": 25000,
  "status": "pending",
  "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
}
```

**400 Bad Request — Validation Error**

``` json
{
  "message": "Validation error message"
}
```

**401 Unauthorized**

``` json
{
  "message": "Unauthorized"
}
```

## PATCH /api/requests/:id

Updates the status of a rental request. Restricted to admin users only.

---

### Authentication

Requires a valid JWT token stored in cookies (`token`). Admin role required.

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| id | string | Yes | The MongoDB ID of the request |

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| status | string | Yes | New status value: `pending`, `confirmed`, `cancelled`, or `completed` |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
{
  "message": "Request status updated successfully"
}
```

**403 Forbidden — Not Admin**

``` json
{
  "message": "Access denied"
}
```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{
  "message": "Request not found"
}
```

response.name: approve request or disapprove admin only

request.description:
## GET /api/feedback/:carId

Retrieves all feedback entries for a specific car.

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| carId | string | Yes | The MongoDB ID of the car |

---

### Responses

**200 OK — Success**

``` json
[
  {
    "_id": "6a07c9b84940abd04b4fb8ab",
    "carId": "69fe3ed3a47f07fe7e3e0ad7",
    "name": "Ahmed Khalil",
    "rating": 5,
    "comment": "Excellent car and very clean.",
    "createdAt": "2024-01-01T00:00:00.000Z"
  }
]
```

**404 Not Found**

``` json
{
  "message": "Car not found"
}
```

## POST /api/feedback

Submits a new feedback entry for a specific car.

---

### Request Body (JSON)

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| carId | string | Yes | The MongoDB ID of the car |
| name | string | Yes | Name of the reviewer |
| rating | number | Yes | Rating from 1 to 5 |
| comment | string | No | Optional review comment |

---

### Responses

**201 Created — Success**
